Name: Gus Flanagan
Details: The self-proclaimed Best Smuggler and Travelling Salesman this side of the Periphery. Gus is the captain of his Buccaneer, dubbed the Betsy. He is constantly on the move always looking for that next big score. Whenever he cannot charm his way through an obstacle, he will more than happily roll up his sleeves and throw down as he likes to put it. He might not always have something that you need but he will most certainly end up selling you something that you really want.
